title: Fix SQL Query to Extract Unique Table Names

statement.markdown: Given a database schema represented as a list of tables, where each table is an object with 'name' and 'columns' properties, write a function that extracts the unique table names from the schema. The function should return an array of unique table names.
statement.inputFormat: A list of tables, where each table is an object with 'name' and 'columns' properties.
statement.outputFormat: An array of unique table names.
statement.notes: Time and space complexity should be efficient.

constraints.description: Number of tables in the schema.
Maximum number of columns in a table.

examples.explanation: The function extracts the unique table names from the schema.
The function handles duplicate table names.

hints.text: Use a Set to efficiently store unique table names.

editorial.title: Editorial Title
editorial.intuition: The function should iterate through the schema and extract table names.
editorial.bruteForce: The function can use a Set to store unique table names.
editorial.optimalSolution: Use a Set to store unique table names and iterate through the schema.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: The function correctly extracts unique table names.
